anna.title: Release Risk Review: Human-Governed Enterprise AI Workflow for Anna
anna.shortDescription: Release Risk Review turns an enterprise release candidate into a structured AI-native workflow: inspect release context, call a release-risk tool, generate targeted test actions, save review state, and stop at a human approval checkpoint.
anna.boundary: Runnable hackathon prototype package; not a published Anna App Store listing; safe simulated release context only.

bandOfAgents.title: Enterprise Multi-Agent Release Governance Orchestrator
bandOfAgents.tagline: Band-ready release governance where planner, risk, QA, and human-review agents coordinate through visible handoffs.
bandOfAgents.shortDescription: Enterprise Multi-Agent Release Governance Orchestrator turns release readiness into a coordinated agent workflow. A planner agent opens the release room, a risk-evidence agent publishes structured release facts, a QA-test agent creates targeted validation work, and a human-review agent holds high-risk releases until evidence is approved.
bandOfAgents.boundary: Local Band-ready proof; does not claim live Band API transcript until account/API access is available.

h0ZeroStack.potentialTrack: Monetizable B2B App or Open Innovation
requiredExternalProof: Architecture diagram connecting front end and back-end components
Demo video under 3 minutes explaining AWS Database usage
h0ZeroStack.recommendation: Do not submit with the current GitHub Pages/Vite/local-state proof. Pursue only if Vercel/v0 and AWS Database access can be completed.
